resources.string: View Verified Apps\' source code on the GitHub website in your web browser
View Verified Apps\' privacy policy in app
View Verified Apps\' License in app
View open source licenses of code that Verified Apps uses in app
Replaces background with pitch black background when dark theme is on
Scroll down to review our privacy policy and license.

Privacy Policy

This app does not store any data permanently other than preferences. This app does not transmit any information to the internet, except when you explicitly choose to submit an app that is not in the internal database. In that case, the app sends the package name, app label, signing certificate SHA-256 fingerprint(s), and basic client version information to Privacy Guides to be reviewed for potential inclusion in the database. No other internet connections are made by this app.

This app can see which apps are installed on your device for the purpose of viewing information about them and checking them against the internal database. You can share and copy verification information to other apps using the share/copy buttons. Clipboard content is only used when you tap copy; it is not read otherwise.

You can provide an apk file to this app which will be temporarily stored in this app's cache directory and deleted as soon as it is done processing the needed information about the apk file.

This privacy policy may be updated from time to time. When it does, you will be prompted to accept the new policy upon opening the app.

Last updated: June 3, 2026.

ISC License

Copyright (c) 2026 Privacy Guides

Permission to use, copy, modify, and/or distribute this software for any purpose with or without fee is hereby granted, provided that the above copyright notice and this permission notice appear in all copies.

THE SOFTWARE IS PROVIDED "AS IS" AND THE AUTHOR DISCLAIMS ALL WARRANTIES WITH REGARD TO THIS SOFTWARE INCLUDING ALL IMPLIED WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY AND FITNESS. IN NO EVENT SHALL THE AUTHOR BE LIABLE FOR ANY SPECIAL, DIRECT, INDIRECT, OR CONSEQUENTIAL DAMAGES OR ANY DAMAGES WHATSOEVER RESULTING FROM LOSS OF USE, DATA OR PROFITS, WHETHER IN AN ACTION OF CONTRACT, NEGLIGENCE OR OTHER TORTIOUS ACTION, ARISING OUT OF OR IN CONNECTION WITH THE USE OR PERFORMANCE OF THIS SOFTWARE.
By checking the checkbox and continuing, you agree to Verified Apps\' privacy policy and license, which are shown above.
Make a donation to support Privacy Guides\' non-profit mission.
"Shows hasMultipleSigners in the app verification screen. This is useful for contributing to the internal verification info database."
Shows share and copy verification info buttons on the app verification screen
